content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.12%, Bank Nifty -1.09%, VIX +8.67% to 18.30 — broad risk-off but Pharma (+0.51%) and FMCG defensives bid. Book is +5,018 unrealized despite the red tape, signalling defensive positioning is working. With 45 minutes to close, focus is on locking in winners via SL trails, NOT on stacking fresh exposure. Deployed at 55%; cash buffer is comfortable.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF -1.3%, VIX spike supports safe-haven. SL 121 well below CMP 123.50 (gap ~2%). Hold defensive position."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 880.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marico +3.3%, broke to new 52w high on Q4 beat (PAT +18%, vol +9%). Current SL 838 already at breakeven+. Raise target to 880 (MOFSL TP 950 gives headroom). Keeping SL at 838 — 1% below CMP 846.90 — respects the 1% trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.4% unrealized, broke out on Q4 (PAT +134%, Encora close). Stock at 1380 with stored SL 1365 already at ~1.1% below CMP — at the trail-gap floor. Raise target from 1500 to 1450 is wrong direction — keep target 1500 since stock can extend. Actually wait: new_target 1450 is BELOW original 1500 — revising. Keep target 1500. Only meaningful action is target retention; SL is already optimal. Emitting MODIFY only if new values differ; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +1.0%, SL 2740 (1.6% below CMP 2817), within 1% floor band but acceptable given low ATR. Bullish chemicals catalyst intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB at 52w high 9096, 3.3x volume. SL 8950 is 1.6% below CMP, target 9550 intact. No change needed — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.4%, Auto sector -1.36%. SL 10440 below CMP 10602 (1.5% gap). Buyback at 12000 floor still ahead (record May 29). Hold through weakness; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.7%, FMCG holding up. SL 470 below CMP 479 (1.9% gap). Q4 beat thesis intact — India FMCG +9.5%, FY27 guidance upgrade. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.8%, near all-time high. Stored SL 1255 is 1.5% below CMP 1274.80, target 1320. No change needed — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM +1.4% post Q4 beat (UVG 16%). SL 1198 is 5.3% below CMP 1265 — wider than ideal but matches the entry's volatility on Q4 day. Target 1330 has room. Hold; will tighten next session."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER -0.6%, faded from ATH 886 to 861. 3.2x volume, order book +61% YoY. SL 850 below CMP (1.3% gap). Thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP flat, near 52w high. HSBC TP 9000. Q4 results May 20 — within 7 sessions, not yet 3-session binary trigger. SL 7950 below CMP 8092 (1.8% gap). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA flat, Pharma sector strength. Q4 results May 21 — 6 sessions out, not yet 3-session binary trigger. SL 1830 below CMP 1872 (2.2% gap). Hold; will reassess as event nears."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LALPATHLAB -1.0%, faded from 1698 high. Research surfaced BEARISH modifier (-0.10) post-entry — Tata 1mg disruption risk, Q4 PAT -15%, ICICI cut TP to 1460. SL 1610 below CMP 1654 (2.7% gap). Letting SL do its job per Rule 17; not preempting. Will reassess at SL or next session."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.66,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TORNTPHARM +3.93% on session, near ATH. Q4 results May 21 — 6 sessions out. SL 4360 below CMP 4534 (3.8% gap). Hold; tighten as event nears."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1198 wide but matches Q4-day volatility. Tighten next session if uptrend holds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 850 = 1.3% below CMP, structure intact."

    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish post-entry research; respecting SL 1610 per Rule 17 rather than preempting."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 May 21; SL 4360 wide enough for now. Will tighten 2 sessions before event."

  "watchlist_notes": "Strong BULLISH candidates surfaced today: TATACONSUM (+0.10 — already have OPEN BUY 20x at 1240 LIMIT, currently CMP 1261 above limit so won't fill; LEAVE as-is, may fill on pullback), DABUR (+0.10 — already held), COFORGE (+0.10 — already held), BAJAJ-AUTO (+0.10 — already held), APOLLOHOSP (+0.08 — already held). Net: most high-modifier BULLISH names are ALREADY in the book. Fresh candidates considered and REJECTED: UPL (-0.03 modifier, YTD -19%, governance + post-results sell-off risk — NO_ACTION), THERMAX/MCX (extended +9%/+5% intraday, chasing rejected). HFCL pending MIS BUY at 133.50 has been OPEN 5+ days — CANCEL recommended but not in this batch's data. Will revisit tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "14 CNC positions, deployed 55%, unrealized +5,018 in a -1.1% Nifty session — defensive sector tilt (Pharma 4 names, FMCG 4 names, Healthcare 2, IT 1, Auto 1, Chemicals 1, Capital Goods 2, Gold 1) is doing the job. Realized -28,429 today (prior session damage). With Sun/Apollo/Torrent earnings May 20-21 (6 sessions out), will need to begin event-trim cycle by Day 25-26. No new entries this tick — capital is well-deployed in working positions; pushing more 30 minutes before close into a -1% VIX-spike tape is exactly the over-trading the experiment is designed to punish. Tomorrow morning is the better admit window if conditions clarify."
}
